case_title: JOANNE P. HARTMANN VS. LAKESIDE CAFE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LAKESIDE CAFE
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (SERVICE UNSUCCESSFUL - DEFENDANT NOT FOUND; $35.00 FEE FOR SERVICE WAIVED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARTMANN, JOANNE P. AS TO DEFENDANT LAKESIDE CAFE

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANTS, ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY NICK PAWUTPOPOULOS--OWNER AND KYLE IRVING--CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $971.00 FILED BY HARTMANN, JOANNE P. AS TO DEFENDANT LAKESIDE CAFE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
